Name: First Prince of the Federated Suns
Details: Initially the Prime Minister of New Avalon and later President of the Federated Suns before it became a constitutional monarchy, the tile is attributed to the head of state and military leader of the interstellar nation ruled by House Davion. The term 'first prince' refers that since the beginning of the Federated Suns the Dukes of Robinson and New Syrtis are also considered to be Princes of the Federated Suns, although the Duke of of New Avalon is considered the first between its peers.
